business.name: Complete Plumbing Denver
business.tagline: Fast Response. Fair Prices. Done Right.

hero.headline: Same-Day Plumbing Repairs — *No Overtime Charges*
hero.subheadline: Denver's trusted plumbers fix pipes, drains, and water heaters fast. Licensed professionals with upfront pricing and guaranteed satisfaction.

services_section.label: WHAT WE DO
services_section.heading: Complete Plumbing Solutions
services_section.subheading: From emergency repairs to routine maintenance, we handle every plumbing challenge with professional expertise.

services.title: Emergency Plumbing Repairs
services.description: Burst pipes, major leaks, and plumbing emergencies fixed fast. Available 24/7 with rapid response times and no surprise overtime fees for evenings or weekends.

services.title: Pipe Repair & Replacement
services.description: Expert diagnosis and repair of leaking, frozen, or damaged pipes. We use quality materials and proven techniques to ensure long-lasting solutions.

services.title: Drain Cleaning & Unclogging
services.description: Professional drain cleaning removes stubborn clogs and buildup. Advanced equipment clears kitchen sinks, bathroom drains, and main sewer lines effectively.

services.title: Water Heater Service
services.description: Complete water heater repair, maintenance, and replacement. We work on all brands and types including tankless systems, ensuring reliable hot water.

services.title: Leak Detection & Repair
services.description: Advanced leak detection finds hidden problems before they cause major damage. Fast repairs protect your property and prevent costly water damage.

about.heading: Denver's Reliable Plumbing Professionals
about.body: Complete Plumbing Denver has served the Metro area for over 15 years with honest, dependable service. Our licensed plumbers deliver quality workmanship on every job, from simple repairs to complex installations. We believe in transparent pricing, same-day service, and treating every home like our own.

reviews.name: Sarah M.
reviews.text: Called at 8pm with a burst pipe flooding my basement. They were here within 45 minutes and had it fixed by 10pm. No extra charges for the emergency call - exactly as promised.

reviews.name: Mike R.
reviews.text: Water heater died on a Sunday morning. Complete Plumbing had a new one installed by noon the same day. Professional crew, fair price, and they cleaned up everything perfectly.

reviews.name: Jennifer K.
reviews.text: Tried to snake my kitchen drain myself for weeks. Their tech found tree roots in the main line and cleared it completely in 30 minutes. Should have called them first!

reviews.name: David L.
reviews.text: Honest assessment of my old pipes and reasonable quote for replacement. Work was completed on schedule and they were careful not to damage my landscaping. Great experience.

service_areas.label: COVERAGE
service_areas.heading: Serving Greater Denver
service_areas.subheading: Fast response times to neighborhoods throughout the Denver Metro area.

cta.heading: Ready to Fix Your Plumbing Problem?
cta.body: Get fast, professional plumbing service with upfront pricing and no overtime charges. Licensed plumbers available for same-day repairs throughout Denver.
